<?php /* * This file is part of the DebugBar package. * * (c) 2013 Maxime Bouroumeau-Fuseau * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace DebugBar\DataCollector; /** * Collects info about PHP */ class PhpInfoCollector extends DataCollector implements Renderable { /** * @return string */ public function getName() { return 'php'; } /** * @return array */ public function collect() { return array( 'version' => implode('.', [PHP_MAJOR_VERSION, PHP_MINOR_VERSION, PHP_RELEASE_VERSION]), 'interface' => PHP_SAPI ); } /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function getWidgets() { return array( "php_version" => array( "icon" => "code", "tooltip" => "PHP Version", "map" => "php.version", "default" => "" ), ); } }
